---
title: "Lecture 6 — The Frontier—Attention, Text, and Causal ML"
author: "Prof. Marcelo Villena Ch., PhD"
affiliation: "Universidad Técnica Federico Santa María, Chile"
date: "Spring 2026"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contenido"
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    highlight-style: github
    html-math-method: mathjax
---

[📄 Descargar PDF](../pdf/lecture-6-nlp-attention-causal-ml.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
